creator: energyrikard@gmail.com
text:
Hi there, 

I wanted to reach out to thank you all for your really cool and helpful answers. I don't know what the ix-guys behind FreeBSD have done, but the error has simply disappeared when I installed FreeBSD 11.2-RELEASE. No more kernel panics! I have rebooted 10 times so far, and still going. Earlier I was lucky if I could even get a single reboot to load properly... 

11.2-RELEASE is the way to go!!!

You may close this ticket. 

Kind Regards, 
Rik
